TARVAN

Intelligence That Moves Matter.

The Physical AI intelligence layer for industrial OEMs. Real-time perception, edge inference, and deterministic actuation — for any machine that needs to see, decide, and act at production speed.

The Framework

Sense. Think. Act.

TARVAN encodes the complete Physical AI loop — from raw perception of the physical world, through distributed decision-making, to physical intervention with measurable impact.

01
SENSE
Industrial-grade machine vision captures every object, every defect, every region — under controlled lighting, at line speed. No cloud. No latency penalty.
CameraIndustrial GigE
LightingControlled LED
CaptureReal-time
02
THINK
Domain-specific ML models run on edge compute. Decision logic trained on real production data. From grading to path planning, in under 85 milliseconds.
ComputeJetson · Industrial Edge
Latency Budget<85ms
ModelsDomain-specific
03
ACT
Deterministic actuator control with defined safe states. Pneumatic ejection, servo motion, or path execution — timed to the millisecond. Every action logged. Every decision auditable.
ActuationPneumatic / Servo / Gantry
TimingDeterministic
AuditFull Traceability
The Platform

Physical AI Intelligence Layer

You build the machine. TARVAN makes it see, think, and act reliably at production speed. A complete stack from camera to actuator.

Edge-First Architecture

No cloud dependency. Runs in factories with poor connectivity. All inference happens on-device, on-premise.

Domain-Specific Models

Not generic computer vision. Trained on real production data — from agri-commodities to industrial process lines. Perception logic built for your domain.

OEM-Ready Integration

Defined mounting specs, IO signals, lighting requirements, and commissioning checklists. Drop into your machine, not reinvent it.

Deterministic Safety

Safe-state logic for every actuator. If the model fails, the system fails safe. Compliance-ready audit logs for FSSAI, ISO, export, and industrial safety certification.
TARVAN Stack Architecture
Application Layer — Process UI · Audit Dashboard
Inference Engine — Domain Models · Decision Logic
Edge Runtime — Jetson · Industrial Edge · Deterministic Scheduler
Hardware IO — Camera · Lighting · Actuators · Sensors
Latency budget: <85ms end-to-end
Verticals

Where Intelligence Meets Production

Proven in sorting. Expanding into process automation. Each vertical shares the same Sense–Think–Act core — only the actuation changes.

Inspection & Grading · Flagship

Cashew Processing

Real-time kernel grading across 4 lanes. Pneumatic ejection by grade. Full production traceability for export compliance.
10/sec
Per lane
4
Parallel lanes
Inspection & Grading · Scale

Food & Agri Sorting

Quality grading for spices, pulses, seeds, and packaged food. Large OEM installed base with clear throughput improvement targets.
FSSAI
Ready
Significant
Reject reduction
Process Automation · Expanding

Garment Finishing

Camera-guided perception of garments on industrial tables. Region detection drives stroke-level path planning for automated finishing equipment.
Perceive
Regions
Plan
Motion paths
Inspection & Grading · High Value

Auto Components

Surface defect detection and dimensional inspection for auto parts. Compliance-driven, high volume, zero-defect tolerance.
ISO
Compliance
High
Volume
For OEMs

Your Machine. Our Intelligence.

TARVAN functions as an ingredient brand for intelligent machines. When present, it signals edge inference, deterministic actuation, and audit-ready traceability — whether the machine inspects, sorts, or automates a process.

How TARVAN Fits Inside Your Machine
Powered by
TARVAN
Intelligence That Moves Matter.
01

Plug-and-Play Integration

Defined BOM, mounting specs, IO signals, and commissioning checklists. Your engineering team integrates TARVAN in weeks, not months.
02

Intelligence-Grade Differentiation

TARVAN helps OEMs position a higher-spec machine with on-device inference, process traceability, and defined latency targets. Commercial uplift depends on segment, throughput, and commissioning scope.
03

Serviceable Intelligence Layer

Model calibration, commissioning support, and software maintenance turn the intelligence stack into a managed layer after install. Commercial terms can be defined per OEM program and support SLA.
04

Compliance-Ready Audit Trail

Every decision logged. Compliance-ready for FSSAI, ISO, and export requirements. Your customers pass audits with data, not paperwork.
Credentials

Built on Institutional Depth

Research-backed, institutionally supported, and validated from day one.

Incubation & Acceleration
IIT Kanpur — SIIC Incubation
NSRCEL — IIM Bangalore
ICAR — Central Institute of Subtropical Horticulture
MaDeIT — IIITDM Kancheepuram
CCS NIAM — Jaipur
DISQ — Digital Impact Square, TCS Foundation
Leadership

Engineering-Led from Day One

SM
Dr. Shanmugakumar Murugesan
Founder & CEO

Physical AI Systems Architect. Industrial vision, edge inference, and machine control.

Ph.D. in System Design from IIITDM Kancheepuram. M.Des. in Electronic Systems Design from IIITD&M Kancheepuram. Building a vertically integrated Physical AI stack for industrial machines — from agri-processing to process automation.

Start Building

Ready to Add Intelligence to Your Machine?

Every engagement begins with an Intelligence Upgrade Plan — a focused assessment of your machine, your data, and the path to production-grade intelligence.
